mapper.insert: BEGIN INSERT INTO TRIP ( MEMBER_ID, NAME, START_DATE, END_DATE, CREATE_DATE, LATEST_DATE, STATUS ) VALUES ( #{memberId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{startDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{endDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), NULL, 'ACTIVE' ) RETURNING TRIP_ID INTO #{tripId, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}; END;
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TRIP_DAY WHERE TRIP_ID = #{tripId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert: BEGIN INSERT INTO TRIP_SCHEDULE ( TRIP_DAY_ID, INDEX_SORT, START_TIME, END_TIME, CONTEXT, CATEGORY, PRICE, MEMO, LINK ) VALUES ( #{tripDayId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{indexSort, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{startTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{endTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bookmarkId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{context, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{category, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{price, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{memo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{link, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) RETURNING TRIP_SCHEDULE_ID INTO #{tripScheduleId, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}; END;
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TRIP_SCHEDULE WHERE TRIP_SCHEDULE_ID = #{tripScheduleId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT TRIP_SCHEDULE_ID as "tripScheduleId", INDEX_SORT as "indexSort" FROM TRIP_SCHEDULE WHERE TRIP_DAY_ID = #{tripDayId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY INDEX_SORT
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TRIP_SCHEDULE WHERE TRIP_DAY_ID = #{tripDayId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
